requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Solomon Islands Authority Having Jurisdiction and NFPA 855 in Project Practice
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——所罗门群岛消防主管机关及项目实践中的NFPA 855
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——索羅門群島消防主管機關及項目實踐中的NFPA 855

summary.en: The Solomon Islands does not have a dedicated national BESS fire-safety installation code or a well-resourced fire authority with formal published BESS-specific installation regulations as of the dataset date. The Solomon Islands Fire and Rescue Service (SIFRS) operates under the Solomon Islands Police Force and has limited technical regulatory capacity for industrial BESS fire-safety approvals. In the absence of a comprehensive national fire code specifically addressing stationary BESS, fire-safety requirements for BESS projects in the Solomon Islands are driven primarily by: (a) international donor agency project specifications — World Bank, ADB, GCF, and SPC-funded Pacific island BESS projects typically reference NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) as the fire-safety installation standard in project technical specifications and EPC procurement documents; (b) Solomon Power / SIEA project-level requirements; and (c) where applicable, Australian Standards AS 5139 (Safety of Batteries) referenced as a secondary legacy standard given the historical Australian colonial and technical influence on Solomon Islands codes. The Solomon Islands is a Pacific Small Island Developing State (SIDS) with high tropical fire risk exacerbated by: high ambient temperatures promoting thermal runaway conditions; cyclone events capable of causing physical damage to BESS enclosures; limited emergency response capacity in outer islands; and sea-freight logistics meaning replacement equipment lead times are significant. These factors make conservative NFPA 855 fire-safety design — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection, ventilation, separation distances, and emergency shutdown procedures — particularly important even where the regulatory mandate may be less formally defined than in developed markets.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，所罗门群岛尚无专门的国家BESS消防安全安装规范，也无具备正式发布BESS专属安装法规能力的充足资源消防机关。所罗门群岛消防和救援服务（SIFRS）隶属所罗门群岛警察部队，针对工业BESS消防安全审批的技术监管能力有限。在缺乏专门针对固定式BESS的综合国家消防规范的情况下，所罗门群岛BESS项目的消防安全要求主要由以下因素驱动：（a）国际捐助机构项目规格——世界银行、亚洲开发银行、GCF和SPC资助的太平洋岛国BESS项目通常在项目技术规格和EPC采购文件中引用NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）作为消防安全安装标准；（b）Solomon Power / SIEA项目级要求；（c）在适用的情况下，鉴于澳大利亚对所罗门群岛规范的历史殖民和技术影响，澳大利亚标准AS 5139（电池安全）被作为次要传统标准引用。所罗门群岛是太平洋小岛屿发展中国家（SIDS），面临高热带火灾风险，且因以下因素加剧：高环境温度促进热失控条件；飓风事件可能对BESS外壳造成物理损坏；外岛应急响应能力有限；海运物流意味着替换设备交货期较长。这些因素使保守的NFPA 855消防安全设计——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测、通风、隔离距离及紧急停机程序——尤为重要，即使监管要求在形式上可能不如发达市场那样明确。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，索羅門群島尚無專門的國家BESS消防安全安裝規範，也無具備正式發布BESS專屬安裝法規能力的充足資源消防機關。索羅門群島消防和救援服務（SIFRS）隸屬索羅門群島警察部隊，針對工業BESS消防安全審批的技術監管能力有限。在缺乏專門針對固定式BESS的綜合國家消防規範的情況下，索羅門群島BESS項目的消防安全要求主要由以下因素驅動：（a）國際捐助機構項目規格——世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行、GCF和SPC資助的太平洋島國BESS項目通常在項目技術規格和EPC採購文件中引用NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）作為消防安全安裝標準；（b）Solomon Power / SIEA項目級要求；（c）在適用的情況下，鑑於澳大利亞對索羅門群島規範的歷史殖民和技術影響，澳大利亞標準AS 5139（電池安全）被作為次要傳統標準引用。索羅門群島是太平洋小島嶼發展中國家（SIDS），面臨高熱帶火災風險，且因以下因素加劇：高環境溫度促進熱失控條件；颶風事件可能對BESS外殼造成物理損壞；外島應急響應能力有限；海運物流意味著替換設備交貨期較長。這些因素使保守的NFPA 855消防安全設計——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測、通風、隔離距離及緊急停機程序——尤為重要，即使監管要求在形式上可能不如已發展市場那樣明確。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (primary fire-safety installation reference in internationally funded Pacific island BESS project specifications; formal SIFRS adoption for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly)

AS 5139:2019 — Safety of Batteries (Australian Standard referenced as secondary legacy standard in some Solomon Islands construction contexts due to historical Australian technical influence; not a mandatory national requirement as of dataset date)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in internationally funded Pacific BESS project specifications)

Solomon Islands Fire and Rescue Service (SIFRS) — authority having jurisdiction; limited published BESS-specific fire-safety installation regulations as of dataset date — verify directly with SIFRS before project design is finalised

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Emergency Management Ministry framework. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Solomon Islands project owners, Solomon Power / SIEA, or international donor agencies as equivalent to NFPA 855 or AS 5139 fire-safety installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for Solomon Islands project review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由应急管理部框架下的地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被所罗门群岛项目业主、Solomon Power / SIEA或国际捐助机构认可为等同于NFPA 855或AS 5139消防安全安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在所罗门群岛项目审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由應急管理部框架下的地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被索羅門群島項目業主、Solomon Power / SIEA或國際捐助機構認可為等同於NFPA 855或AS 5139消防安全安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在索羅門群島項目審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; includes system-level fire-related safety requirements)

gap.en: Gap: Fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 is the expected standard in internationally funded Solomon Islands BESS projects. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy NFPA 855-referenced project requirements, donor procurement rules, or the project-level requirements of Solomon Power / SIEA. The Pacific SIDS context creates additional fire-safety design gaps beyond those in developed-market BESS installations: (a) confirm directly with SIFRS whether any formal fire-safety installation approval process exists for BESS and what documents are required — given limited regulatory capacity, project-developer-led NFPA 855 compliance documentation is the practical path; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation (cell-to-cell and module-to-module propagation barriers), gas detection and ventilation design rated for tropical humidity, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) tropical resilience additions — cyclone-rated enclosure structural design, IP65+ for outdoor coastal sites, anti-corrosion treatment for salt-mist environment, and heat dissipation capacity validated at 35°C+ ambient; (d) logistics and emergency response — design for extended response times; the nearest specialist fire response capability and replacement parts may require multi-day sea-freight lead times from Australia or Fiji; (e) where SIFRS approval is obtainable, engage a SIFRS-approved fire protection specialist for design review; where not, document NFPA 855 compliance for donor and project-owner review.
gap.zh: 差距：符合NFPA 855的消防安全设计文件是所罗门群岛国际资助BESS项目的预期标准。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足NFPA 855引用项目要求、捐助方采购规则或Solomon Power / SIEA项目级要求。太平洋小岛屿发展中国家背景在发达市场BESS装置之外带来额外的消防安全设计差距：（a）直接向SIFRS确认BESS是否存在正式消防安全安装审批程序及所需文件——鉴于监管能力有限，由项目开发商主导的NFPA 855合规文件是实际路径；（b）准备符合NFPA 855的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解（电芯间和模组间蔓延隔离）、适用于热带湿度的气体探测和通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）热带适应性补充——飓风等级外壳结构设计、户外沿海站点IP65以上、盐雾环境防腐处理，以及在35°C以上环境温度下经验证的散热能力；（d）物流和应急响应——针对延长响应时间进行设计；距最近专业消防响应能力及替换零件可能需要从澳大利亚或斐济进行多天海运；（e）若可获得SIFRS审批，聘请SIFRS认可的消防专家进行设计审查；若不可行，为捐助方和项目业主审查准备NFPA 855合规文件。
gap.zht: 差距：符合NFPA 855的消防安全設計文件是索羅門群島國際資助BESS項目的預期標準。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足NFPA 855引用項目要求、捐助方採購規則或Solomon Power / SIEA項目級要求。太平洋小島嶼發展中國家背景在已發展市場BESS裝置之外帶來額外的消防安全設計差距：（a）直接向SIFRS確認BESS是否存在正式消防安全安裝審批程序及所需文件——鑑於監管能力有限，由項目開發商主導的NFPA 855合規文件是實際路徑；（b）準備符合NFPA 855的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解（電芯間和模組間蔓延隔離）、適用於熱帶濕度的氣體探測和通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）熱帶適應性補充——颶風等級外殼結構設計、戶外沿海站點IP65以上、鹽霧環境防腐處理，以及在35°C以上環境溫度下經驗證的散熱能力；（d）物流和應急響應——針對延長響應時間進行設計；距最近專業消防響應能力及替換零件可能需要從澳大利亞或斐濟進行多天海運；（e）若可獲得SIFRS審批，聘請SIFRS認可的消防專家進行設計審查；若不可行，為捐助方和項目業主審查準備NFPA 855合規文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice for internationally funded BESS projects where donor or project specifications require NFPA 855 compliance; SIFRS formal mandatory fire-safety installation code for BESS not confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with SIFRS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under Emergency Management Ministry framework

source.publisher: Solomon Islands Police Force (parent organisation of Solomon Islands Fire and Rescue Service — SIFRS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Solomon Islands Fire and Rescue Service (SIFRS) has limited published BESS-specific fire-safety installation regulations; however, NFPA 855 is the expected fire-safety design standard in internationally funded Pacific island BESS projects (World Bank, ADB, GCF, EU, JICA, SPC). Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy NFPA 855-referenced project or donor requirements. Prepare NFPA 855-aligned fire-safety design documentation — including tropical derating for high temperature, humidity, cyclone loading, and salt-mist corrosion — before equipment procurement is finalised. Engage SIFRS directly at the earliest project stage to confirm applicable fire-safety approval requirements, and engage a Pacific-region fire protection specialist with BESS and tropical site experience.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所罗门群岛消防和救援服务（SIFRS）发布的BESS专属消防安全安装法规有限；然而，NFPA 855是国际资助太平洋岛国BESS项目（世界银行、亚洲开发银行、GCF、欧盟、JICA、SPC）的预期消防安全设计标准。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足NFPA 855引用的项目或捐助方要求。在设备采购最终确定前，准备符合NFPA 855的消防安全设计文件——包括针对高温、高湿度、飓风荷载和盐雾腐蚀的热带降额。在项目最早阶段直接与SIFRS接触，确认适用消防安全审批要求，并聘请具有BESS和热带站点经验的太平洋地区消防专家。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 索羅門群島消防和救援服務（SIFRS）發布的BESS專屬消防安全安裝法規有限；然而，NFPA 855是國際資助太平洋島國BESS項目（世界銀行、亞洲開發銀行、GCF、歐盟、JICA、SPC）的預期消防安全設計標準。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足NFPA 855引用的項目或捐助方要求。在設備採購最終確定前，準備符合NFPA 855的消防安全設計文件——包括針對高溫、高濕度、颶風荷載和鹽霧腐蝕的熱帶降額。在項目最早階段直接與SIFRS接觸，確認適用消防安全審批要求，並聘請具有BESS和熱帶站點經驗的太平洋地區消防專家。
